title: senecio iloensis
intro: Senecio iloensis, also known as Ilo Senecio or Ilo Groundsel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the high-altitude regions of the Andes in South America, particularly in Peru. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Senecio iloensis include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems.
